description: Diagnostics-only bakeoff harness for SAM3/Falcon-style promptable segmentation masks as vertex and face-rectification signals.

falcon.notes: Open-vocabulary detection/segmentation candidate; external masks keep the repo dependency-free.

sam3.notes: Promptable segmentation candidate; direct adapter intentionally not wired until local package/API is stable.
